actions.name: create_agents

email.description: The email address of the agent

name.description: The name of the agent. Falls back to the linked user's name if not provided.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_ai_agents_agent_id_runs

prompt.description: The prompt/query to send to the agent

sourceImageUrl.description:
Optional URL of the source image to edit. When provided, the agent
will use this as the base image for editing operations (e.g., remove
background, add text, resize). The agent can see this image and will
use its URL when calling image editing tools.

imageUrls.description:
Optional array of reference image URLs for style guidance.
These images are shown to the agent for visual context but are
not the source for editing. Use sourceImageUrl for the image to edit.

outputSchema.description:
Optional JSON schema for structured response extraction.
If provided, the agent's response will be parsed and
extracted according to this schema.

resourceId.description: Resource ID to provide context (e.g., customer ID, ticket ID)

isTestMode.description: If true, mutating tools will be skipped but tracked

readOnlyMode.description: If true, mutating tools are completely removed

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle side effect; approval required

actions.name: create_apps_app_id_checklists

handle.description: URL-friendly handle for the checklist. Auto-generated if not provided.

customerSegmentId.description: ID of a customer segment to show this checklist to.

description.description: Description of what this step requires.

conditionType.description: Type of condition that triggers completion.

conditionValue.description: Value to compare against (event name, metric threshold, etc.).

allowManualCompletion.description: Whether users can manually mark this step complete.

allowSkip.description: Whether users can skip this step.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_apps_app_id_plans_features

type.description: The type of the feature. Use "string" for multivariate (enum) features.

defaultValue.description: The default value of the feature. For "string" features this must be one of allowedValues.

allowedValues.description: Required when type is "string". Array of allowed enum values.

description.description: A brief description of the feature.

usageMetricId.description: The ID of the usage metric associated with the feature.

visible.description: Whether the feature is visible to customers.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_apps_id_app_events

platformEventId.description: Unique identifier for the platform event (automatically generated if not provided)

occurredAt.description: When the event occurred (defaults to current time)

id.description: Optional Plan ID if the plan exists

previousId.description: Optional Previous plan ID if the plan exists

previousExternalId.description: Optional previous external ID for lookup

netChange.description: Optional net change in subscription value

trialDays.description: Number of trial days for the plan

charge.description: Charge object for one-time charge events and refunds

externalId.description: External ID for looking up existing charges
Optional external ID for later lookup

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_apps_id_plans

interval.description: The billing interval of the plan.

currencyCode.description: The currency code for the plan.

trialDays.description: The number of trial days for the plan.

public.description: Indicates if the plan is public.

visible.description: Indicates if the plan is visible.

shopifyPlans.description: Shopify plans associated with the plan.

flexBilling.description: Indicates if the plan has flexible billing.

onUsageLimitReached.description: Action when usage limit is reached.

rollOverPendingUsage.description: Indicates if pending usage should roll over.

filename.description: Original filename. Used to derive the storage key and is preserved as object metadata.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file. Optional hint; the actual Content-Type is set by the client when PUTting to the signed URL.

name.description: Display name shown in the helpdesk UI

actions.name: create_companies

parentCustomerId.description: The id of the primary customer, if any.

actions.name: create_customers

shopifyDomain.description: The shopify domain of the customer, ex. example.myshopify.com.

shopifyShopId.description: The shopify shop id of the customer.

url.description: The qualified url of the customer, ex. https://www.example.com.

companyId.description: The Mantle id of the company to associate with the customer. If no company is found, assume this is shopifyShopId.

countryCode.description: The country code of the customer.

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency of the customer.

industry.description: The industry classification of the customer.

items.description: A list of tags to associate with the customer. Will replace the entire set of tags.

customFields.description: An object of custom fields, keyed by the custom field name. Values will be upserted and values not included will be ignored.

items.description: Can only be used to set All apps and App specific customFields for the app installation.

id.description: The app installation id. The correct appInstallation id can be determined by finding the desired app.id or app.name in the appInstallations array of the customer object.

appId.description: If the appId is specified and no id is provided, a new app installation will be created. This is used for creating lead customers on specific apps. This field can not be changed on an app installation with an id.

customFields.description: An object of custom fields, keyed by the custom field name. Values will be upserted and values not included will be ignored. App level fields can be specified per app installation instance, as well as specific fields.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_customers_custom_fields

appId.description: The ID of the app to associate with the custom field

name.description: The name of the custom field

type.description: The type of the custom field

options.description: The options for the custom field if the type is "select" or "multiselect"

appLevel.description: If true, and no appId is set, the field will be settable on all apps. If false and no appId is set, it will be a customer level field.

showOnCustomerDetail.description: If true, the field will be shown on the customer detail page by default. Can be toggled by the user.

private.description: If true, your field will only be accessible via the API by your client. If false, all clients can access the field but only your client can mutate it.

filterable.description: If true, the custom field can be used as a filter in the customer list and customer segments.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_deal_activities

name.description: The name of the deal activity

description.description: A description of the deal activity

timelineTitleTemplate.description: Template for the timeline title when this activity is used

timelineDescriptionTemplate.description: Template for the timeline description when this activity is used

defaultWeight.description: The default weight/probability impact of this activity (0-100) when adding as a deal stage trigger

icon.description: The icon identifier for the activity

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_deal_flows

name.description: The name of the deal flow

description.description: The description of the deal flow

name.description: The name of the deal stage

displayOrder.description: The display order of the stage

defaultDealOwnerId.description: The ID of the default deal owner

isDefaultDealFlow.description: Whether this is the default deal flow for the organization. Only one deal flow can be the default at a time.

actions.name: create_deals

amount.description: The monetary value of the deal

amountCurrencyCode.description: The currency code for the deal amount

acquisitionChannel.description: The channel through which the deal was acquired

acquisitionSource.description: The specific source of the deal acquisition

firstInteractionAt.description: The timestamp of the first interaction

dealFlowId.description: The ID of the deal flow. If not provided, uses the default deal flow (isDefaultDealFlow=true) or the first active deal flow by displayOrder.

dealStageId.description: The ID of the deal stage. If not provided, uses the first stage of the resolved deal flow by displayOrder.

domain.description: The domain of the customer when creating a deal with just a contact

shopifyDomain.description: The shopify domain of the customer when creating a deal with just a contact

contactIds.description: Array of contact IDs (alternative to contacts array)

customer.description: Create or update a customer inline (alternative to customerId). Matches existing customers by domain or shopifyDomain.

domain.description: The domain of the customer (used for matching)

shopifyDomain.description: The Shopify domain of the customer (used for matching)

tags.description: Tags to associate with the customer

countryCode.description: The country code of the customer

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency of the customer

contacts.description: Create or update contacts inline (alternative to contactIds). Matches existing contacts by email. Contacts are linked to both the customer and the deal.

email.description: The email of the contact (required, used for matching)

phone.description: The phone number of the contact

jobTitle.description: The job title of the contact

label.description: The label for the contact relationship (e.g., "primary", "technical")

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

notes.description: Notes or description for the event

dealActivityId.description:
ID of the associated deal activity. If provided and the activity is configured

dealStageId.description:
ID of the stage to progress the deal to. When provided, the deal will be updated
to this stage and a progression event will be created.

appEventId.description: ID of the associated app event

occurredAt.description: When the event occurred (defaults to now)

userId.description: ID of the user who created the event (defaults to authenticated user)

actions.name: create_tickets

subject.description: The subject line of the ticket

priority.description: The priority level of the ticket

contactId.description: The ID of the primary contact

contactIds.description: Array of contact IDs to associate with the thread (in addition to the primary contactId)

channelId.description:
The ID of the channel to attribute this ticket to. If omitted, the
ticket is placed on a per-organization "API" chat channel that is
created on first use.

assignedToId.description: The ID of the assigned agent

updatedAt.description: When the ticket was last updated

lastMessageAt.description: When the last message was sent

contact.description: Contact object to upsert (if contactId not provided)

inboxId.description: Assign the ticket to this Inbox. Must belong to the organization.

cxEmailAddressId.description:
Preferred outbound sender (CXEmailAddress) for emails on this
ticket. Must have `useForOutbound: true`. When omitted, the
channel's default outbound address is used at send time.

send.description:
When `true`, the ticket (and any inline `message`) is
processed as a real ticket would be: configured
automations, notifications, and outbound delivery run.
When `false` (or omitted), the ticket is persisted without
triggering any side effects.

message.description:
Optional initial message to create with the ticket. When
`send: true` with `actorType: agent`, the outbound email
sender is selected automatically from the organization's
configured email channels; the ticket's `channelId` is not
used for delivery in that case.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_tickets_id_events

oldValue.description: The previous value before the change (JSON object)

newValue.description: The new value after the change (JSON object)

actorType.description: The type of actor who caused the event

agentId.description: ID of the agent (required if actorType is 'agent')

contactId.description: ID of the contact (required if actorType is 'customer')

threadMessageId.description: ID of the associated thread message (optional)

occurredAt.description: When the event occurred (defaults to now)

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_tickets_id_messages

actorType.description: The type of actor who sent the message

content.description: Message content (required, defaults to a single space if empty)

contentType.description: The format of the message content

isInternal.description: Whether this is an internal note

contactId.description: ID of the contact (required if actorType is 'customer')

agentId.description: ID of the agent (required if actorType is 'agent')

occurredAt.description: When the message was sent (defaults to now)

messageId.description: RFC-5322 Message-ID header for email threading

inReplyToId.description: RFC-5322 In-Reply-To header for email threading

referencesIds.description: RFC-5322 References header for email threading

sizeBytes.description: Size of the attachment in bytes

contact.description: Contact object to upsert (if contactId not provided)

email.description: Email of the contact (required for matching)

send.description:
When `true`, the message is processed as a real reply
would be: configured automations, notifications, and (for
`agent` actor) outbound delivery run. `agentId` is required
when `actorType: agent`. When `false` (or omitted), the
message is persisted without triggering any side effects.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_tickets_saved_filters

name.description: Display name for the saved filter.

filters.description: Filter selections to persist. Free-form JSON object — keys typically mirror the query parameters accepted by GET /tickets (status, priority, assignedToId, tags, customerId, channelId, search, etc.).

displayOrder.description: Sort order. Lower values appear first.

actions.risk: medium: external Mantle mutation; approval required

actions.name: create_tickets_saved_replies

handle.description: URL-safe handle. Defaults to a slugified `title`.

content.description: Body of the saved reply, typically a TipTap JSON document.

isPrivate.description: When true, the reply becomes private to the OAuth session's user. Mutually exclusive with `roles`.

appInstallationId.description: The app installation to associate this comment with

attachments.description:
Files to attach to the comment. Each entry must reference

originate from `POST /attachments` are rejected.

draft.description:
The current draft reply. When provided with `adjustment` the agent
rewrites the draft per the instruction; when provided alone the
agent returns an improved version of the draft.

adjustment.description:
Free-text direction for the agent (e.g., "make it more formal",
"apologise for the delay"). When provided without a `draft`, the
agent generates a fresh reply following the direction.

actions.name: update_customers_custom_fields_id

appId.description: The ID of the app to associate with the custom field

appLevel.description: If true, and no appId is set, the field will be settable on all apps. If false and no appId is set, it will be a customer level field.

showOnCustomerDetail.description: If true, the field will be shown on the customer detail page by default. Can be toggled by the user.

private.description: If true, your field will only be accessible via the API by your client. If false, all clients can access the field but only your client can mutate it.

filterable.description: If true, the custom field can be used as a filter in the customer list and customer segments.

actions.name: update_customers_id

shopifyDomain.description: The shopify domain of the customer, ex. example.myshopify.com.

shopifyShopId.description: The shopify shop id of the customer.

url.description: The qualified url of the customer, ex. https://www.example.com.

companyId.description: The Mantle id of the company to associate with the customer. If no company is found, assume this is shopifyShopId.

countryCode.description: The country code of the customer.

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency of the customer.

industry.description: The industry classification of the customer.

items.description: A list of tags to associate with the customer. Will replace the entire set of tags.

customFields.description: An object of custom fields, keyed by the custom field name. Values will be upserted and values not included will be ignored.

items.description: Can only be used to set All apps and App specific customFields for the app installation.

id.description: The app installation id. The correct appInstallation id can be determined by finding the desired app.id or app.name in the appInstallations array of the customer object.

appId.description: If the appId is specified and no id is provided, a new app installation will be created. This is used for creating lead customers on specific apps. This field can not be changed on an app installation with an id.

customFields.description: An object of custom fields, keyed by the custom field name. Values will be upserted and values not included will be ignored. App level fields can be specified per app installation instance, as well as specific fields.
